title: Shinji Ikari Raising Project
wikitext:
[]: Shinji Ikari Raising Project Post by The Forgotten Knight » Mon Jan 17, 2011 11:42 pm I tried looking and I'm suprised I didn't find a thread already about this manga. Has anyone read it? I think it's pretty cool to see the cast in a normal setting and without all the emotional baggage. What I like is that the writers are also able to maintain their personalities acuratley.

[]: Re: Shinji Ikari Raising Project Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 18, 2011 12:02 am The Forgotten Knight wrote: I tried looking and I'm suprised I didn't find a thread already about this manga. Has anyone read it? I think it's pretty cool to see the cast in a normal setting and without all the emotional baggage. What I like is that the writers are also able to maintain their personalities acuratley.
